# Kotacom IT Service & Publications - Full
> Solusi IT & Digital Terpadu untuk Bisnis Anda

Website: https://kotacom.id
Location: Surabaya, Indonesia
WhatsApp: +6285799520350

## About Kotacom
Kotacom provides end-to-end digital solutions ranging from hardware procurement to software development, printing services, and digital marketing. The primary operation is in Surabaya but they serve clients nationwide.

## Core Services
1. **IT Support & Maintenance**
   - Jasa service komputer panggilan
   - Instalasi jaringan (LAN, WiFi)
   - Recovery data & upgrade infrastruktur IT
   - Maintenance kontrak perusahaan
2. **Website & Software Development**
   - Jasa pembuatan website company profile, e-commerce, toko online, web portal
   - Pembuatan software custom (POS kasir, ERP, SIMRS, Koperasi, Sistem Akuntansi)
   - Mobile app development (React Native, Flutter)
3. **Printing Services (Percetakan)**
   - Cetak buku digital (POD) & offset
   - Cetak kalender meja/dinding
   - Cetak brosur, flyer, map ijazah, dan packaging

## Technology Stack & Capabilities
- **Frontend Development:** Next.js, React, Astro, Vue.js, Nuxt.js, Angular, Tailwind CSS, TypeScript
- **Backend Development:** Node.js, Laravel, Python, Django, PHP, Java
- **Database:** MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB
- **Cloud & DevOps:** AWS, Google Cloud, Docker, Kubernetes
- **CMS:** Sanity.io (Headless CMS)

## Key Projects
- Sistem Manajemen Koperasi Digital (Koperasi Maju Bersama)
- Sistem POS Fashion Retail (Butik Cantik Collection)
- IT Infrastructure Upgrade (CV Maju Bersama)
- Sistem Manajemen Kasus Hukum (Law Firm Harapan & Partners)
- Website Toko Online UMKM (Batik Nusantara)
- Sistem Manajemen Apotek Digital (Apotek Sehat Mandiri)
